title: ObjectRequest
description: ObjectRequest: IRequest that pulls cells and their metadata from the excel file.

Worksheet.description: Name of the worksheet to read from.

Range.description: Cell range to read. If left empty, entire extent of the spreadsheet starting from A1 is used. CellRange: Object representing an orthogonal range between two cell in the spreadsheet.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
